mission.title: dify: Add metadata filter support for external knowledge base
mission.description: Add metadata filter support for external knowledge base. Requested by 10+ users.

steps.title: Check current dify setup
steps.description:
Verify your dify deployment is running:
```bash
docker compose ps
```
This feature requires a working dify installation.

steps.title: Review the feature request
steps.description: Users with external knowledge bases (e.g., Milvus) need metadata filter support to implement features like document-level filtering. The existing metadata filtering logic had an unassigned variable issue and only worked for internal datasets.

steps.title: Apply the metadata filter support
steps.description:
The fix includes three improvements:

1. Fixed the `get_metadata_filter_condition` function to resolve the unassigned variable issue in the metadata filtering condition logic
2. Refined the `DatasetRetrieverTool` invocation to allow flexible metadata filtering through all `metadata_filtering_mode` options (now works for both internal and external datasets)
3. Related improvements for metadata handling consistency

Upgrade to the dify version that includes this feature.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm that metadata filters work correctly for both internal and external knowledge bases.

resolution.summary: Improved the metadata filtering condition logic to fix an unassigned variable issue and extended the DatasetRetrieverTool to support flexible metadata filtering for both internal and external datasets.

prerequisites.description: Docker and Docker Compose for running dify. Alternatively, a Kubernetes cluster for K8s-based deployment.
